name: FLUX — retrato natural con descripción
content: A professional portrait photograph of a woman in her early thirties with naturally wavy auburn hair and green eyes. She is wearing a simple linen shirt and looking slightly off-camera with a calm, thoughtful expression. Soft window light from the left creates gentle shadows across her face. Shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, bokeh background of a blurred indoor space.

name: FLUX — paisaje narrativo
content: A breathtaking aerial photograph of a remote Scottish highland valley at dawn. Rolling green hills covered in heather are partially obscured by morning mist drifting between them. A winding river catches the first golden light of sunrise. The sky is a gradient of deep blue to warm orange. No people visible. Shot from above with a wide angle lens, sharp focus throughout.
